marketplace.name: autoconference
marketplace.description: Multi-agent research conference skill suite — run structured AI research sessions with parallel researchers, adversarial debate, and automated reporting.

skills.name: autoconference
skills.description: Core conference loop — orchestrates 3–5 parallel researchers, Devil's Advocate, and chairman synthesis over multiple rounds.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: 8-step interactive setup wizard — configures topic, depth, researcher personas, output format, and checkpoint settings before the conference starts.

skills.name: resume
skills.description: Checkpoint recovery — detects the latest saved state and resumes a paused or interrupted conference from where it left off.

skills.name: analyze
skills.description: Post-conference analysis — synthesizes all round transcripts into structured insights, citations, and gap analysis.

skills.name: debate
skills.description: Adversarial 2-researcher format — pits two opposing AI researchers against each other in structured rebuttal rounds to stress-test a hypothesis.

skills.name: survey
skills.description: Literature survey mode — generates a systematic review outline, clusters related work, and produces a comparative summary table.

skills.name: ship
skills.description: Conference results shipping — packages transcripts, analysis, and figures into a shareable report (Markdown / PDF / Notion).
